jsonLd.title: Principal Investment Banker at Instamojo
jsonLd.description:
We at Instamojo are looking for an experienced Investment Banker based out of Vijayawada. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Instamojo:
Instamojo is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in Forecasting
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in Ind AS
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in Budgeting

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Professional development and training programs
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Annual performance appraisal
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Vijayawada, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Instamojo!
